title: Suicide Risk Screening: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
ilable from: https://www.nimh.nih.gov/research/research-conducted-at-nimh/asq-toolkit-materials 
National Institute of Mental Health [Internet]. Bethesda (MD): U.S. Department of Health and Human Services; Frequently Asked Questions About Suicide; [reviewed 2023; cited 2024 Feb 2]; [about 5 screens]. Available from: https://www.nimh.nih.gov/health/publications/suicide-faq 
National Institute of Mental Health [Internet]. Bethesda (MD): U.S. Department of Health and Human Services; Suicide Prevention; [reviewed Aug 2023; cited 2023 September 5]; [about 8 screens]. Available from: https://www.nimh.nih.gov/health/topics/suicide-prevention 
National Institute of Mental Health [Internet]. Bethesda (MD): U.S. Department of Health and Human Services; Suicide Risk Screening Tool; [updated 2020 Jul 1; cited 2023 Aug 21]; [about 1 screen]. Available from: https://www.nimh.nih.gov/sites/default/files/documents/research/research-conducted-at-nimh/asq-toolkit-materials/asq-tool/screening_tool_asq_nimh_toolkit.pdf 
O'Rourke MC, Jamil RT, Siddiqui W. Suicide Screening and Prevention. In: StatPearls [Internet]. Treasure Island (FL): StatPearls Publishing; c2023 [updated 2023 March 6; cited 2023 Sept 5]; [about 10 screens]. Available from: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK531453/ 
Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration [Internet]. Rockville (MD): U.S. Department of Health
